research.title: AI-Accelerated Exploitation: The Mythos-Era Threat Model
research.summary: The gap between vulnerability discovery and real-world exploitation is collapsing. Mythos is an AI model that demonstrates the ability to identify vulnerabilities and generate working exploits much faster than traditional approaches. While security analysts.

research.title: Why Use App-Level Auth When Every Database Has Auth? (Splunk Enterprise CVE-2026-20253 Pre-Auth RCE)
research.summary: Three posts? In three days? Are we insane? We're home alone, there's no one to stop us, and we're up past bedtime. So, we need to talk about Splunk. On June 10th, Splunk published this CVE-2026-20253 advisory : It has everything that we love: No.

research.title: CVE-2026-35273 | Oracle PeopleSoft PeopleTools Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution Vulnerability | Active Exploitation
research.summary: SimpleHelp has released patches for CVE-2026-48558, an authentication bypass vulnerability affecting deployments configured to use OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication. The issue stems from how SimpleHelp validates identity provider assertions, Oracle has.

research.title: CVE-2026-48558: SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Indicators of Compromise
research.summary: At Horizon3.ai, we have been experimenting with generative AI heavily across all areas of work. One area I commonly work in is vulnerability research. Early in 2026, and inspired by DARPA’s AIxCC, I ventured into creating an autonomous vulnerability research.

vulns.title: Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Vulnerability: Logic flow weakness in Remote Access and Mobile Access
vulns.whatBroke: Vulnerability: Logic flow weakness in Remote Access and Mobile Access
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at fevar54/CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/fevar54/CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit
cd CVE-2026-50751---Check-Point-IKEv1-Authentication-Bypass-Exploit
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Security Gateway
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: GL.iNet Beryl AX Triple RCE PoC
vulns.summary: A flaw has been found in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This impacts the function snprintf of the file /cgi-bin/glc of the component FTP Protocol Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument media_dir can lead to command.
